candidate.name: Andrej Karpathy
candidate.summary: Building a kind of JARVIS. Previously Director of AI at Tesla, Founding member at OpenAI. Expert in Deep Learning, Computer Vision, and LLMs.

experience.description: Led the Autopilot Vision team. Developed the neural network architecture for Full Self-Driving (FSD).
Founding member. Worked on Generative Models and Deep Reinforcement Learning.

projects.title: llm.c
projects.impact: LLM training in simple, pure C/CUDA. 20k+ GitHub stars.

projects.title: nanoGPT
projects.impact: The simplest, fastest repository for training/finetuning medium-sized GPTs.

projects.title: micrograd
projects.impact: A tiny scalar-valued autograd engine and a neural net on top of it.

education.title: PhD in Computer Science · Stanford University (2011–2016)

achievements.title: Creator of CS231n: Convolutional Neural Networks for Visual Recognition at Stanford
